heading: Assessment of alternative policy mechanisms for addressing greenhouse gas emissions
label: 13384 Assessment of alternative policy mechanisms for addressing greenhouse gas emissions

children.text: Various systems for controlling the generation of greenhouse gases, including caps for the generation of greenhouse gases from major sources and emissions trading programs.

Federal standards for energy efficiency for major sources of greenhouse gases, including efficiency standards for power plants, industrial processes, automobile fuel economy, appliances, and buildings, and for emissions of methane.
Various Federal and voluntary incentives programs.
